Each task must have: id (T001...), title, description, req_type (FR/NFR), complexity (1-5), dependencies (list of task IDs), source (line reference).

[REQ-01] Actor: Customer — The Customer should Allow customers to browse and search products by category and keyword.
[REQ-02] Actor: Customer — The Customer should Allow customers to add products to cart and complete secure checkout.
[REQ-03] Actor: Customer — The Customer should Allow customers to track their orders in real time after purchase.
[REQ-04] Actor: Seller — The Seller should Allow sellers to manage product listings, inventory, and pricing.
[REQ-05] Actor: Seller — The Seller should Allow sellers to view sales analytics and revenue reports.
[REQ-06] Actor: Customer — The Customer should Allow customers to submit product ratings and written reviews.
[REQ-07] The system should handle peak traffic during sale events with response times under two seconds for all browsing and checkout operations.
[REQ-08] The system should be encrypted and stored in compliance with data protection standards.
[REQ-09] The system should be accessible from both desktop and mobile browsers without degradation in functionality.
[REQ-10] The system should integrate with at least one payment gateway for online transactions.
[REQ-11] The system should support Arabic and English interfaces.
[REQ-12] The system should Ideally support cryptocurrency payments if technically feasible in future phases.
[REQ-13] The system should handle at least one thousand concurrent users during peak sale periods.
